g.text: In the year 2015, the developer first set foot upon the public forge, and the epic began.
Then came the Dark Age: two hundred and forty-nine days, and not a single commit.
And lo, nova-anvil rose from nothing, and eight thousand stars gathered to witness it.
Then came the Dark Age: three hundred and ten days, and not a single commit.
Then came the Dark Age: four hundred and eighty-nine days, and not a single commit.
And lo, ember-atlas rose from nothing, and two thousand stars gathered to witness it.
And lo, comet-ledger rose from nothing, and nine hundred stars gathered to witness it.
And lo, quiet-orrery rose from nothing, and three hundred stars gathered to witness it.
